$schema: Place per-role 512x512 (and optional 128x128) PNGs alongside this file and list them here. The Mascot component will switch from the procedural SVG variant to the PNG once both files exist.

lead.descriptor: violet-hooded conductor with a tiny glowing baton-pen

coder.descriptor: cyan-scarfed engineer with round wire glasses and a subtle circuit-pattern cheek tattoo

reviewer.descriptor: peach-jacket auditor with a magnifying monocle

researcher.descriptor: lime-beret explorer with a tiny folded map tucked behind one ear

designer.descriptor: lavender beanie with paintbrush bristles peeking out the top

ops.descriptor: grey-overalls mechanic with a single glowing wrench earring
